caption: A man with dark hair and glasses performs in front of a neutral-colored slatted wall. He wears a white collared shirt under a black vest embellished with blue floral embroidery and a red and white patterned accent along the chest. He stands behind a microphone on a stand, singing while holding a light-colored guitar. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. The white text "ORCA" appears on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone with his mouth open, while his hand moves slightly on the body of the guitar. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle stays fixed on the performer.
